description:
Remove (or repoint) the 3 broken Plotinus single-Ennead sources.

neoplatonism/plotinus-on-the-beautiful, -on-intelligible-beauty, -on-the-good-or-the-one each landed only 1 trivial chunk: their format=html URLs hit single Ennead *section* sub-pages, so raw extraction captured 2130 B / 2391 B / 80 B (the 80 B one is essentially empty) and the chunk bodies still carry nav boilerplate ("Sacred Texts Classics Index Previous Next Section 8..."). The full Enneads already live in plotinus-select-works-index (html_multi, 1432 raw pages, 838 chunks).

TWO PATHS (decide before implementing):
(1) REMOVE (recommended — redundant with the index): delete the 3 [[source]] entries, their chunking/neoplatonism/*.toml, and corpus/neoplatonism/<id>/ dirs; re-run embed_corpus.py + graph rebuild.
(2) REPOINT: if dedicated per-Ennead citation labels (Ennead I.6 / V.8 / VI.9) are wanted over the index's generic section labels, re-point at full-tractate sources and re-acquire + chunk + embed.

ACCEPTANCE: no near-empty (1-chunk, <500 B raw) neoplatonism sources; reconciliation diff clean; guru.db consistent.
Parent: c75f8a2e.
